---
title: "R Refresher"
short-title: "R Refresher"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "A concise refresher on R fundamentals for readers who need a quick review."
keywords: ["R", "refresher", "tutorial", "basics"]
---

# R Refresher {#sec-r-refresher}

::: {.callout-note}
This appendix is under development.
:::
